title: UD DDM Dataset
summary: Demo notebook loads pre-computed DDM (dependency distance minimization) statistics from 314 Universal Dependencies treebanks. Parses treebank summaries and core-argument dependency records into DataFrames, then visualizes DDM(n) curves by sentence length per treebank and compares naive vs. sentence-length-standardized DDM values. Uses mini dataset with 3 treebanks (Abkhaz, Abaza, Afrikaans) and 3 core-argument records.
